title: Ulagam Oruvanukka Lyrics Kabali Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Ulagam Oruvanukka
Singers: Ananthu, Santhosh Narayanan, Gana Bala
Lyrics: Kabilan
Tamil RAP Lyrics: Vivek
English RAP Lyrics: Roshan Jamrock

ulagam oruvanukkaa
uzhaippavan  yaar ?
vidai tharuvaan
kabali thaan
kalagam seidhu
aandairain kathai
mudippaan

vidhayaaga
vazhum namakku.
kadhaigal irukku
naalai namakkae vidiyum
vizhithu poraadu

king of time
in the concrete
jungle watching over
my pride

naanga enga porandhaa
ada unakkenna podaa
thamizhanukkaaga
vandhu ninnavan
thamizhandaa

am stalking my prey
wont let them get away
with the things
that they do
bad moves that they make

vandhavana
ponavana
vaazha vachchavan
ini vazhndhu kaatta
poren vaaya moodi
gavvani.

dressed to kill
call it kabali swag
come and get some
like thi k town clan
it aint about the size
of if the dog
in the fight.
but the spirit
of the fight.
in the dog
thats right.

vaerum poovum
verillai.
karumegam pola
neerillai
alai kadal adangumo
adhigaara kuralukku

vidhayaaga
vazhum namakku.
kadhaigal irukku
naalai namakkae vidiyum
vizhithu poraadu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys themes of resilience and determination, celebrating the spirit of overcoming challenges.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Kabali, the song underscores the protagonist's journey and struggles, enhancing the overall narrative.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features talented artists like Ananthu, Gaana Bala, and Santhosh Narayanan.

When was the song released?

Ulagam Oruvanukka was released on June 12, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ulagam Oruvanukka, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the protagonist's indomitable spirit in Kabali. The collaboration of Ananthu, Gaana Bala, and Santhosh Narayanan brings a unique flavor that motivates listeners. The lyrics by Kabilan resonate with themes of struggle and triumph, evoking a sense of empowerment. This song serves as an anthem for those facing challenges, making it a memorable part of the film's narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ulagam Oruvanukka from Kabali is a powerful anthem that encapsulates the spirit of resilience and determination. With a unique collaboration between Ananthu, Gaana Bala, and Santhosh Narayanan, this track delivers an energetic vibe that resonates with fans. The lyrics by Kabilan further amplify the song's motivational essence, making it a must-listen for anyone seeking inspiration.
stanzaMeanings: Come, come, my friend.
Who is the one who works for the world? Kabali will give a farewell, having fought and completed the story.
You have come as a fire, even if your eyes are closed, do not let your dreams fade away.
Like the shadow of a flower, like a creeping vine, do not let me go away from you.
We live as fate decides. There are stories, tomorrow we will wake up and fight.
The sky is yours, do not forget to fly in your path.
Hey, I have a hundred plans, Kabali is coming, get ready.
Like a snake, I will spin and sing, you will create the song.
Hey, because of this, I will not come to the crowd anymore.
The opposing group has fallen, the fire has joined in the darkness.
This is the leader who is fierce, Kabali.
King of time in the concrete jungle watching over my pride.
Wherever we are born, what does it matter? I have come for Tamilians, I am a Tamil.
I am stalking my prey, won't let them get away with the bad things they do.
The one who came is the one who will live, I will show my life, closing my mouth.
Dressed to kill, call it Kabali swag, come and get some, it’s not about the size of the dog in the fight, but the spirit of the fight in the dog, that’s right.
There is no other flower. There is no water like a dark cloud, will the waves of the sea stop for the loud voice?
I always fall with the rain. You cannot escape from me...
Is it a cold breeze that will take everything away?
The call of the one who can change, now will not be heard in the country.
Will this face be revealed when the eyes are opened?
We live as fate decides. There are stories, tomorrow we will wake up and fight.
The sky is yours, do not forget to fly in your path.
Hey, I have a hundred plans, Kabali is coming, get ready.
Like a snake, I will spin and sing, you will create the song.
Hey, because of this, I will not come to the crowd anymore.
The opposing group has fallen, the fire has joined in the darkness.
